policy.purpose: Research-only candidate ledger for scholarship discovery sources.
policy.public_row_rule: Do not publish a scholarship row from an aggregator candidate until the canonical official provider page is verified.
policy.automation_rule: Discovery adapters may create review leads, not public scholarship rows.

candidates.name: BachelorsPortal scholarship sitemap discovery
candidates.allowed_use: Low-volume URL discovery and manual lead review; canonical provider page must be verified before row creation.
candidates.blocked_use: Bulk scraping, account-wall bypass, or copying portal-only content into public rows.
candidates.notes: Robots allow general crawling but source pages can include account-gated content. Treat as a lead source.

candidates.name: FindAPhD search reference
candidates.allowed_use: Manual research context, partnership exploration, and official university page discovery when independently verified.
candidates.blocked_use: Automated scraping or row ingestion from protected search/listing pages.
candidates.notes: The current environment receives Cloudflare protection for direct fetches, and the site operates a commercial listings model.
